Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: CA before RI Must check before reserving RI before PI Must reserve before picking PI before QC Must pick before checking quality QC before PO before packing PO before GSL Must pack before labeling GSL before D Must label before dispatching

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always Before If first second previously So A greater than B Always After If first second following So A less than B

Text: Also Payment Invoice part Usually Invoice happens after Dispatch or around Packing Lets say after Dispatch to ensure shipment

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND

Name: Backtracking - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always After Set of A B where A must be before B for example RO to CA is RO CA

Name: Validation - PE
